title: parosela psoralioides
intro: Parosela psoralioides is a plant species native to tropical regions, specifically in the family Rubiaceae. It is also known as the "Mayten" tree, but it's more commonly referred to by its scientific name. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Parosela psoralioides include wound healing, fever reduction, and antimicrobial effects, which can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts for various health purposes.
